title: dactylorhiza × rombucina
intro: Dactylorhiza × rombucina, also known as Rombucco Orchid, is a hybrid orchid resulting from the cross between Dactylorhiza sambucina and Dactylorhiza maculata. The medicinal properties of Dactylorhiza × rombucina include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Dactylorhiza × rombucina can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used both topically and internally to harness its medicinal properties.
